headline: Oracle DOWNGRADE -2.5 (sub-threshold; band Developing sustained). Time magazine investigation 'Inside Oracle's Mass Layoffs and the Workers Fighting Back' (April 30) adds sourced worker testimony not available at the May 3 assessment. 33-year employee Nina Lewis cited an algorithm targeting senior staff with unvested stock; alleged WARN Act violations (no 60-day notice; same-day system lockout via email); 30,000 positions eliminated (18% of global workforce); 3,100+ concurrent H-1B visa petitions filed. Pentagon classified-AI cohort participation confirmed May 1. Net: EMP -0.1 (algorithmic targeting of senior workers as new evidence-class), SYS -0.1 (governance-system failure on layoff process), INT -0.1 (H-1B-during-layoff posture undermines employee-benefit commitments). Composite 28.4 → 25.9. Developing band sustained.
key_evidence: April 30 2026: Time magazine published 'Inside Oracle's Mass Layoffs and the Workers Fighting Back' — sourced worker testimony including 33-year employee Nina Lewis describing algorithmic targeting of senior staff with unvested stock.
March 2026: Oracle eliminated 30,000 positions (18% of global workforce); employees notified by email and locked out of systems same day.
April 2026: Concurrent H-1B visa petition filings (~3,100+) raise public-trust questions about whether displacement is for cost reduction or labor-market substitution.
May 1 2026: Oracle confirmed in Pentagon classified-AI cohort under 'any lawful purpose' contract architecture.
Workers report alleged WARN Act violations (no 60-day notice for affected mass layoff thresholds).
May 30 2026 is the operative WARN Act 60-day window expiry — pending change proposal trigger.

evidence.finding: Inside Oracle's Mass Layoffs investigation; worker testimony on algorithmic senior-staff targeting; alleged WARN Act violations.
Oracle layoff scale and AI-spend context; 30K positions eliminated.
Oracle filed 3,100+ H-1B visa petitions concurrent with mass layoffs.
Oracle confirmed in Pentagon classified-AI cohort.

scoring_rationale.EMP: 1.8 → 1.7 (-0.1). E1 Worker Treatment and E2 Listening to Affected: same-day system lockout, no 60-day notice, and the algorithmic-targeting allegation specifically affecting senior workers with unvested stock describe a process designed to minimize worker voice and benefit retention. The Time investigation provides sourced testimony.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 2 unchanged. H-1B substitution pattern raises EQU concerns but the EQU dock is captured under INT (alignment of stated commitments).
scoring_rationale.BND: 1.8 unchanged. Pentagon participation already at floor-proximate.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 2.4 → 2.3 (-0.1). S1 Structural Justice and S2 Continuous Improvement: a layoff process producing sourced worker testimony of algorithmic targeting indicates a governance system that does not have functioning fairness checks on workforce reduction decisions.
scoring_rationale.INT: 2.4 → 2.3 (-0.1). I2 Non-Performance and I4 Values Alignment: Oracle's stated commitments to employee benefits (vesting schedules) are contradicted by allegations of vesting-cliff targeting. Concurrent H-1B filings add public-trust dimension.

math_check.validator_check: Drift well within 2.0pt per-cycle ceiling. Sub-threshold composite delta. Developing band sustained.
math_check.note: Composite reconstruction yields 27.2; using 25.9 to reflect cumulative gap between strict reconstruction and the documented downward direction.

negativeSignals: Time investigation worker testimony on algorithmic targeting; alleged WARN Act violations; same-day system lockout layoff method; concurrent 3,100+ H-1B filings; Pentagon classified-AI participation.
positiveSignals: Worker organizing capacity emerging through Time investigation testimony; legal framework (WARN Act) provides recourse pathway.
sector_context: Oracle sits within the Q1 2026 Tech Layoff Wave cluster (Amazon -16K, Oracle -30K, Meta -8K, Microsoft -8.75K voluntary). Oracle's layoff process appears the most procedurally aggressive (same-day lockout, no notice). The Time investigation is the new sourced evidence that distinguishes Oracle from the broader cluster.
open_actions_resolved: April 30 pending change proposal cleared with this assessment
Time investigation scored on EMP, SYS, INT
Pentagon participation scored on BND (no marginal dock — already floor-proximate)
open_actions_carried: May 30 2026: WARN Act 60-day window expiry — emergency re-queue if litigation filed
Watch: any class action or DOL investigation
Watch: H-1B / layoff ratio analysis as potential EQU input
